problem_owner_org.name: Budgy Smuggler
problem_owner_org.description: Australian swimwear brand operating retail stores, ecommerce, and custom design workflows.

problem.title: Custom retail order management breaks down at scale
problem.description: Budgy Smuggler outgrew spreadsheets as its order volume grew from tens of orders a week to hundreds and then thousands. The case study says expansion added staff, manufacturers, and locations, making it harder to manage the growing custom-design division, keep customers updated, and streamline incoming leads and website orders.

requirements.body: Replace spreadsheet-based order and workflow tracking with a system that scales as order volume increases.

citations.source_title: How Budgy Smuggler streamlines its custom retail processes on monday.com
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, multi-office operations, growth from spreadsheet use, and the need to manage custom design, customer updates, leads, and orders.

requirements.body: Reduce manual work involved in keeping customers updated on order progress.

requirements.body: Streamline management of leads and website orders across locations.

citations.source_title: How Budgy Smuggler streamlines its custom retail processes on monday.com

pilot_framework.scope: Pilot the workflow on custom-order intake, lead handling, website-order routing, and customer update processes for one region or business line.
pilot_framework.suggested_kpis: Track time to process custom orders, percentage of customer updates sent automatically, lead-to-order response time, and order-routing accuracy by region.
pilot_framework.success_criteria: The pilot succeeds if the team can manage high-volume orders without spreadsheets, reduce manual customer-update work, and give staff clearer visibility into leads and orders.
pilot_framework.common_pitfalls: Common pitfalls include keeping separate local processes by office, incomplete routing rules for orders, and failing to standardize updates for custom-design customers.
pilot_framework.duration: A 6- to 8-week pilot is appropriate for one high-volume order workflow with cross-functional staff involvement.
pilot_framework.resource_commitment: Requires an operations lead, sales or ecommerce staff, and light configuration support to map workflows, routing rules, and customer communications.

citations.source_title: How Budgy Smuggler streamlines its custom retail processes on monday.com
